commands.review_summary:
This PR changes the shared non-DM auto-reply opener from `group chat` to neutral `shared ... chat` wording and updates focused prompt tests plus a Codex prompt snapshot.

PR surface: Source +6, Tests +16. Total +22 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows Mattermost public channels map to `chat_type: channel`, while current main and `v2026.6.10` still route `channel` turns through a helper that says `group chat`; I did not run a live Mattermost server repro.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The remaining blocker is contributor-provided real behavior proof and maintainer selection among same-issue PRs, not an automated code repair on this branch.

target.title: fix(cron): treat generic 'LLM request failed' error as transient server_error
target.body:
Closes #93931

## What Problem This Solves

The generic assistant error text `"LLM request failed."` was not classified as any transient error type — `classifyFailoverReason` returned `null`, so `resolveCronExecutionRetryHint` returned `{ retryable: false }` and `payload.fallbacks` never engaged.

## Why This Change Was Made

The exact-match regex `/^llm request failed\\.$/i` classifies this error as `server_error` (transient), enabling cron retry and model fallback. Only the bare `"LLM request failed."` string matches; variants like `"LLM request failed: provider rejected the request schema or tool payload."` are not caught (they are format errors, not transient).

## Evidence

```text
$ npx tsx -e 'import { classifyFailoverReason } from "./src/agents/embedded-agent-helpers/errors.ts"; ...'

classifyFailoverReason results:
LLM request failed.                                   → server_error
llm request failed.                                   → server_error
LLM request failed: provider rejected the schema...   → null
LLM request failed: connection refused...              → null
```

**Not tested:** Live gateway cron job execution with an actual LM Studio model-not-loaded failure.
